purpose: Tracks Figma nodes with more than one visible fill paint so renderer exactness is not silently assumed.

rendererPolicy.currentRenderer: Renderer supports one solid fill plus one image fill path for common nodes, but full arbitrary Figma paint-stack compositing is not claimed exact.
rendererPolicy.exactnessRule: Do not add more complex paint stacks without either exact renderer support or explicit unsupported audit coverage.
